name: Prepared Pancake Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and sift the ingredients together three times.
2. Store in a dry place.
3. To use, take 1 cup of the mixture and add 1/2 cup of dry bread crumbs.
4. Beat 1 egg in a separate cup and pour into the mixture.
5. Add sweet or sour milk until it forms a batter.
6. Stir in more milk if necessary to achieve the desired consistency.
7. Cook on a hot griddle.
